name: Nate Maness
bio: American mixed martial artist who turned pro in 2013 and competed in the UFC from 2020 to 2024, earning three Performance of the Night bonuses across flyweight through featherweight. Compiled a 16-3 MMA record with notable wins over Johnny Munoz and Jimmy Flick. Released by the UFC in June 2024 and signed with BKFC in September 2024, opening his bare-knuckle career 2-0 with a title shot against Jamel Herring scheduled for May 2026.
